versions.notes: Initial versioned release with auto-update checks
Detect overlapping Claude sessions (warning at startup, note at exit, marker in --stats), add macOS sound support, and use os.tmpdir() for cross-platform temp files (Linux, WSL, macOS).
Add --no-noop and --noop-threshold flags to exclude long idle/typing pauses (e.g. waiting for budget replenishment) from stats.
Pro-rate session times to queried date range. Sessions spanning midnight no longer inflate single-day stats with time from other days.
Show per-day breakdown in multi-day date range stats (e.g. --stats week, --stats DATE1 DATE2).
Detect stalled sessions (e.g. budget limit, network disconnect) after 60 minutes of no PTY output. Timer stops and work is counted only up to the last observed activity.
